manifest.name: Import
ui.title: Import
ui.description: Move current DokuWiki or Obsidian content into a new Imported folder.
ui.sourceDescription: Select a content folder or a complete backup archive. Analysis does not write to the vault.
ui.chooseFolderHint: DokuWiki data or an Obsidian vault
ui.chooseArchiveHint: ZIP, TAR, TAR.GZ or TGZ backup
ui.noSourceFound: No supported DokuWiki or Obsidian content was found.
ui.sourceFailed: The source could not be opened. Choose another folder or archive.
ui.analysisDescription: Detecting structure, links, notes and files. Nothing is written yet.
ui.analysisFailed: The source could not be analyzed. No data was imported.
ui.structureDescription: Edit the proposal before anything is imported.
ui.sensitiveWarning: Imported material may contain logins, passwords or other private data. Review it after import and move it to Secrets or delete it yourself.
ui.name: Name
ui.selectItem: Select an item in the proposal.
ui.confirmPlan: I reviewed the proposed structure and want to create it under Imported.
ui.warning.dokuwiki-unsupported-syntax: Unsupported DokuWiki syntax was preserved for manual review.
ui.warning.dokuwiki-interwiki-link: An interwiki link was preserved for manual review.
ui.warning.dokuwiki-missing-page: A page link could not be resolved.
ui.warning.dokuwiki-missing-media: A media link could not be resolved.
ui.warning.obsidian-ambiguous-link: A link has more than one possible destination.
ui.warning.obsidian-missing-link: A link destination could not be found.
ui.warning.obsidian-note-embed-degraded: An embedded note was converted to an ordinary link.
ui.validation.invalid-parent: This item must be placed under a compatible parent.
ui.validation.missing-parent: The parent item no longer exists.
ui.validation.parent-cycle: The structure contains a parent cycle.
ui.validation.duplicate-target-path: Another item uses the same destination.
ui.validation.invalid-kind: This item type is not supported.
ui.applyingDescription: Verstak is validating and publishing the reviewed plan.
ui.applyFailed: The import was not completed. The existing vault was not changed.
ui.cancelConfirm: Cancel the import? Published data will be rolled back.
ui.cancelFailed: The cancellation request could not be sent.
ui.completeDescription: The new content is ready in Imported. You can arrange it manually.
